name: peer
description: Review Codex prompts with Fable 5 and inject a sharper peer-programmer brief before the turn runs.

interface.shortDescription: Fable prompt peer review for Codex
interface.longDescription: Peer uses Codex hooks and the Claude Code CLI (claude -p) to ask Fable 5 to review each [peer] prompt before the turn. Fable inspects the workspace with read-only tools, keeps a persistent resumable session per Codex thread, and returns a structured amended brief that Peer injects as additional context. The peer skill can also be used manually for a second opinion.
defaultPrompt: Ask Peer to improve this prompt
